title: Everything You Need to Know About Selling Music Online and Accepting Bitcoin
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: As a musician in Nigeria, you've probably faced the frustrating reality of not being able to sell your music online using PayPal or Stripe due to geographic restrictions. You're not alone. Many creators in restricted countries struggle to monetize their digital products, including ebooks, courses, and music. This post breaks down the challenges and solutions for selling music online, specifically focusing on accepting Bitcoin payments. Let's dive in and explore how you can start selling your music online and getting paid in Bitcoin, even with restricted payment platforms.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Selling music online and accepting Bitcoin payments is a game-changer for creators like you who face geographic restrictions or banking limitations. It's not just about having an alternative payment method; it's about having a reliable way to monetize your digital products, connect with your audience, and get paid in a currency that's not tied to a specific country or bank. The freedom to sell and get paid in Bitcoin without intermediaries like PayPal or Stripe is a huge advantage, especially for musicians who rely on their digital products for income.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The technology behind selling music online and accepting Bitcoin payments involves a combination of frontend and backend components. The frontend wallet integration, provided by Web3 Wallet Connect, allows buyers to scan a multi-chain QR code and pay in their preferred cryptocurrency. The backend, powered by the Shop Engine, automates the delivery of digital products, verifies payments, and generates PDF receipts, all without requiring a payment processor account. This seamless process ensures that creators can focus on what matters most – making music and connecting with their audience.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This solution is specifically designed for musicians and creators in restricted countries who face challenges in accepting payments from conventional payment platforms. It's also ideal for solo developers building crypto-native digital product stores. The goal is to provide a reliable and efficient way to monetize digital products, connect with a global audience, and get paid in a currency that's not tied to a specific country or bank. Whether you're an independent musician or a developer, this solution is tailored to your needs and goals.
Selling music online and accepting Bitcoin payments is a game-changer for creators in restricted countries.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The key components that make this solution work together are the Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and NOWPayments. The Shop Engine provides the backend infrastructure for automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. Web3 Wallet Connect offers frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds, allowing buyers to pay in their preferred cryptocurrency. NOWPayments, the payment processor, supports 300+ coins, including BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and more, and requires no KYC or buyer account.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you understand the technology and components behind selling music online and accepting Bitcoin payments, it's time to take action. Here's a step-by-step guide to get you started: first, sign up for a Shop Engine account and set up your digital product store; next, integrate Web3 Wallet Connect to enable frontend wallet integration and multi-chain QR code generation; third, connect NOWPayments as your payment processor to accept cryptocurrency payments; finally, promote your digital products and start selling. With these steps, you'll be able to monetize your music online and get paid in Bitcoin, even with restricted payment platforms.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
The Shop Engine and Web3 Wallet Connect provide a reliable and efficient way to monetize digital products and get paid in a currency that's not tied to a specific country or bank.

Your Action Checklist

To start selling music online and accepting Bitcoin payments, follow these steps: set up a Shop Engine account and configure your digital product store; integrate Web3 Wallet Connect to enable frontend wallet integration and multi-chain QR code generation; connect NOWPayments as your payment processor to accept cryptocurrency payments; promote your digital products and start selling; receive payment and deliver your digital products via automated delivery; generate PDF receipts for each transaction; and review transaction logs for analytics and insights.
With NOWPayments, you can accept payments in 300+ coins, including BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and more, without requiring a KYC or buyer account.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
